text.title: Product Operations (PM-side) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Product Ops function exists in the org?

conclusion.verdict: no Product Ops; use solo product-operations methodology

branch.question: RACI <=90 days old AND no org change?

conclusion.verdict: author/refresh RACI + canonical map + escalation path
